title: Refresh or archive claude-code-swarm-architecture.md for runner-neutral model
description:
docs/claude-code-swarm-architecture.md (last touched Jan, Claude-specific) predates runner-neutral handoff and the removal of standalone 'tk run'. Bring it in line with reality or archive it.

Decide and do ONE: (a) update it to the current runner-neutral orchestration model (harness as orchestrator; Claude Code AND Codex; tick files/notes/branches/worktrees as handoff; no 'tk run'), cross-referencing skills/ticks/references/agent-runner.md; OR (b) if it's purely historical, prepend a clear 'Archived / superseded by <pointer>' banner and stop maintaining it. Prefer (a) if the doc still carries useful architecture content.

FILE SAFETY: edits only this file. No code, no tests.
acceptance_criteria: docs/claude-code-swarm-architecture.md either updated to runner-neutral orchestration language (no removed tk run, no Claude-only framing) or clearly marked archived/superseded with a pointer to the current model
